_comment_1: ATOMIC GRANULARITY ONLY. One row per requirement, not per chapter. A 14-day project should produce on the order of 100 rows. If your row count is implausibly low for project age, the loop will self-terminate before the product is good. This is the Flatline failure mode.
_comment_2: Allowed status values: not_started | partial | done | out_of_scope. Rows whose status is partial or done should carry implementationRefs. testRefs are required when there is executable behavior to test (e.g. game logic, routes); they may be empty for doc-only requirements (risk registers, scope fences, design intent files). followupRefs link to F-NNN entries in docs/FOLLOWUPS.md.

rows.requirement: Vision: Doom-mechanics FPS in a rubber-hose noir look with an endless dungeon and death-driven meta progression.
Design pillars: doom in the fingers, every frame a cel, death pays the rent, the city never ends.
Platform: desktop web pointer-lock FPS on Next.js + Three.js + Vercel, no binary assets.
rows.note: PR #173 added mobile touch controls (F-025 resolved); desktop pointer lock unchanged.

rows.requirement: Core loop: run, die, bank earnings, spend at the office, run again with rent applied.
Endless chunked dungeon generation with shared edge gateways, rooms, corridors, vaults, ring difficulty.
Doom momentum movement with friction 0.90625/tic, unnormalized diagonals, sliding grid collision.
Seven-slot arsenal with Doom damage dice, cycle times, pellets, spread, and ammo economy.
Combat: DDA hitscan, visible cartoon projectiles, Doom splash with crate chains, armor absorption.
Five-goon bestiary with Doom HP/pain-chance/attack-gamble AI, infighting, ring-gated spawn mix.
Doom doors (2.19 m/s, 4.3s hold, bounce-back) plus locked vaults with same-chunk keys.
Doom item economy: cheese heals, vest/trench armor, ammo boxes, coin denominations, luck drops.
RL2 meta: fog-of-war Case Board, escalating costs, labor inflation, Armory tiers, the rent with banking.
Relics: eight one-run contraband items consumed on run start.
Rubber-hose art: grayscale ink primitives, line boil, procedural textures, character rig, viewmodels.
Film post pass: three presets, animated grain, scratches, vignette, diffusion filter.
Doom status bar with reactive five-tier mugshot, damage and pickup flashes, weapon bob.
Hold-Tab automap of explored cells with upgradeable radius and relic pickup dots.
Synthesized audio: gunshots, cartoon cues, vinyl-crackle swing ambience, mute.
Screen flow: title, run, death card, office, pause; e2e-drivable via test events.
Persistence: zod-validated meta and film preset in localStorage.
Testing: unit specs for every pure module plus full-loop and motion e2e.
Performance: instancing, lazy chunk meshes, AI sleep radius, capped decals, throttled overlays.
Scope fence for the reboot (cuts list).

_comment_4: 2026-07-07 reboot: REQ-001..REQ-066 covered the arena game and are out_of_scope; REQ-100+ cover the endless-dungeon reboot.
